PASS | cpu_dummy_writes_oam.nes | [0;37mTEST: cpu_dummy_writes_oam [0;33mThis program verifies that the CPU does 2x writes properly. Any read-modify-write opcode should first write the origi- nal value; then the calculated value exactly 1 cycle later.  Requirement: OAM memory reads MUST be reliable. This is often the case on emulators, but NOT on the real NES. Nevertheless, this test can be used to see if the CPU in the emulator is built properly.  [0;37m[0;37mTesting OAM.  The screen will go blank for a moment now. [0;37mOK; [0;37mVerifying opcodes... [1;34m0E[1;34m2E[1;34m4E[1;34m6E[1;34mCE[1;34mEE [1;34m1E[1;34m3E[1;34m5E[1;34m7E[1;34mDE[1;34mFE  [1;34m0F[1;34m2F[1;34m4F[1;34m6F[1;34mCF[1;34mEF [1;34m1F[1;34m3F[1;34m5F[1;34m7F[1;34mDF[1;34mFF  [1;34m03[1;34m23[1;34m43[1;34m63[1;34mC3[1;34mE3 [1;34m13[1;34m33[1;34m53[1;34m73[1;34mD3[1;34mF3  [1;34m1B[1;34m3B[1;34m5B[1;34m7B[1;34mDB[1;34mFB               [0;37m Passed
